name: Arrow Loose
description: Natural bow releasing arrow through forest

prompts.label: natural yew bow releasing arrow through dappled forest
prompts.text: natural yew bow releasing arrow through dappled forest, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.text: gut bowstring snapping forward with organic twang, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: wooden arrow whistling through leaves after release
prompts.text: wooden arrow whistling through leaves after release, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.text: handcrafted shaft cutting through morning mist, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay
